data.title: Stripe and Paradigm reveal Tempo layer-1 blockchain for stablecoin payments infrastructure
data.description:
Stripe and Paradigm unveiled Tempo, a layer-1 blockchain designed for stablecoin payments. A Sept. 4 announcement from Paradigm founder Matt Huang validates speculation that began when Stripe posted and quickly deleted blockchain engineering job listings in August
source: https://cryptoslate.com/stripe-and-paradigm-reveal-tempo-layer-1-blockchain-for-stablecoin-payments-infrastructure/
